_comment: CANONICAL scoring data for the website — per-fiber WEARER hazard scores (0 clean → 100 high concern) + formula constants + risk thresholds. Mirrors the Toxome APP (toxome/assets/data/fiber_database.json + lib/config/scan_config.dart). Both lib/fabricScores.ts and scripts/fabricScores.js read from THIS file so they can never diverge. Verify/regenerate against the app with: node scripts/sync-fiber-scores.js [--write] (run with the toxome app repo as a sibling directory). Worker-health + environment concerns are informational in the app and never affect this number.
